response.justification: Candidate is a strong generalist software engineer, but the resume shows only about six months of professional C++ work (National Instruments, 2014-2015) plus a university thesis project — far short of the 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows required. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience (only MySQL/MongoDB/generic SQL), and no exposure to fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking. Primary expertise is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, which does not match the mandatory profile.
strengths: Long, varied senior-level engineering career with strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Some low-level/systems exposure via DLang microservices and C/C++ work at National Instruments
Excellent communication signals: workshops, talks, courses, and open-source leadership
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, well below the 5-10 year mandatory requirement
No SQL Server or Oracle background, and no Windows-platform development focus
Zero fixed income, derivatives, or investment banking / capital markets domain exposure

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain knowledge
